# `EnableRasterIRQ`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, X16  
**Parameters:** `—`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>EnableRasterIRQ();</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[address] - address</li>
    <li>[byte] - value</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Enables raster interrupts. The same as below.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
lda $d01a
ora #$01
sta $d01a
lda #$1B
sta $d011
</code>


</div>
